Package org.eventb.core.ast

package org.eventb.core.ast
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.eventb.core
     
    org.eventb.core.ast.datatype
     
    org.eventb.core.ast.expanders
     
    org.eventb.core.ast.extension
     
    org.eventb.core.ast.tests
     
  • Class
    Description
    Assignment
    Common implementation for event-B assignments.
    AssociativeExpression
    AssociativeExpression is the AST type for associative expressions in an event-B formula.
    AssociativePredicate
    AssociativePredicate is the AST class for the associative predicates in an event-B formula.
    ASTProblem
    Describes a problem encountered when dealing with a formula.
    AtomicExpression
    AtomicExpression is the class for all atomic expressions in an event-B formula.
    BecomesEqualTo
    Implements the deterministic assignment, where an expression is given for each assigned identifier.
    BecomesMemberOf
    Implements the set-based assignment, where a set expression is given for the assigned identifier.
    BecomesSuchThat
    Implements the most general assignment, where a predicate is given on the before and after values of assigned identifiers.
    BinaryExpression
    BinaryExpression is the class for all binary expressions in an event-B formula.
    BinaryPredicate
    BinaryPredicate is the base class for all binary predicates in an event-B formula.
    BooleanType
    Denotes the predefined boolean type which corresponds to the set of boolean values.
    BoolExpression
    BoolExpression represents the bool keyword of an event-B formula.
    BoundIdentDecl
    This class represents a declaration of a bound identifier in a quantified formula.
    BoundIdentifier
    Represents a bound identifier inside an event-B formula.
    DefaultFilter
    Implementation of a default filter that does not select any sub-formula.
    DefaultInspector<F>
    Default implementation of a formula inspector that finds nothing.
    DefaultRewriter
    Implementation of a default rewriter that does not perform any rewriting.
    DefaultSimpleVisitor
    Default class implementing ISimpleVisitor.
    DefaultVisitor
    Default visitor that does nothing, while traversing the whole AST.
    Expression
    Common class for event-B expressions.
    ExtendedExpression
     
    ExtendedPredicate
     
    Formula<T extends Formula<T>>
    Formula is the abstract base class for all nodes of an event-B formula AST (Abstract Syntax Tree).
    FormulaFactory
    This class is the factory class for all the AST nodes of an event-B formula.
    FreeIdentifier
    This class represents identifiers occurring free in an event-B formula.
    GivenType
    Denotes a type defined by the user.
    IAccumulator<F>
    Common protocol for accumulating findings while inspecting sub-formulas of a formula.
    IDatatypeTranslation
    Common protocol for translating Event-B formulas containing datatype extensions to plain set theory.
    Identifier
    This is the base class for all identifiers in an event-B formula.
    IExtensionTranslation
    Common protocol for translating mathematical extensions to function applications.
    IFormulaFilter
    Common protocol for formula filters.
    IFormulaFilter2
    This interface extends IFormulaFilter to add support for predicate variables.
    IFormulaInspector<F>
    Common protocol for inspecting formulas.
    IFormulaRewriter
    Common protocol for formula rewriters.
    IFormulaRewriter2
    This interface extends IFormulaRewriter to add support for predicate variables.
    IInferredTypeEnvironment
    Common protocol for inferred type environments.
    IntegerLiteral
    IntegerLiteral represents a literal integer in an event-B formula.
    IntegerType
    Denotes the predefined integer type which corresponds to the set of all integers.
    IParseResult
    Common protocol for reporting results of the AST parser.
    IPosition
    Common protocol for a position in a formula.
    IResult
    Common protocol for reporting results of AST operations.
    ISealedTypeEnvironment
    This type represents a sealed (immutable) type environment.
    ISimpleVisitor
    Simplified version of the visitor.
    ISimpleVisitor2
    This interface extends ISimpleVisitor to add support for predicate variables.
    ISpecialization
    Common protocol for describing a specialization, which groups together type substitutions, free-identifier substitutions, and predicate-variable substitutions in one object.
    ITypeCheckResult
    Protocol for the result of type-checking a formula.
    ITypeEnvironment
    Common protocol for accessing type environments.
    ITypeEnvironment.IIterator
    Protocol for iterating over a type environment.
    ITypeEnvironmentBuilder
    Common protocol for building type environments.
    ITypeVisitor
    Simple visitor for traversing types.
    IUpgradeResult<T extends Formula<T>>
    Common protocol for reporting results of upgrading a mathematical formula to a new language version.
    IVisitor
    Implementation of the visitor design pattern for event-B formulas.
    IVisitor2
    This interface extends IVisitor to add support for predicate variables.
    LiteralPredicate
    This class represents a literal predicate in an event-B formula.
    MultiplePredicate
    MultiplePredicate is the class for all predicates taking a variable number of expression arguments in an event-B formula.
    ParametricType
    Implementation of an instance of a parametric type contributed by a math extension.
    PowerSetType
    Denotes a power-set type.
    Predicate
    Represents predicates.
    PredicateVariable
    This class represents a predicate meta-variable in an event-B formula.
    ProblemKind
    This enumeration contains all the problems that can be encountered by the various checkers.
    ProblemSeverities
    This contains all possible problem severities.
    ProductType
    Denotes a product type.
    QuantifiedExpression
    QuantifiedExpression is the class for all quantified expressions in an event-B formula.
    QuantifiedExpression.Form
    Enumerations of the possible forms that a quantified expression can take.
    QuantifiedPredicate
    QuantifiedPredicate is the class for all quantified predicates in an event-B formula.
    QuantifiedUtil
    This class provides some static method which are useful when manipulating quantified formulas.
    RelationalPredicate
    RelationalPredicate is the class for all relational predicates of an event-B formula.
    SetExtension
    SetExtension is the base class for a set extension in an event-B formula.
    SimplePredicate
    SimplePredicate represents a predicate builds from a single expression in an event-B formula.
    SourceLocation
    Location of a formula in a string.
    Type
    Common protocol for event-B types.
    UnaryExpression
    UnaryExpression is the base class for all unary expressions in an event-B formula.
    UnaryPredicate
    UnaryPredicate is the base class for all unary predicates in an event-B formula.
